conservative.name: Sigmar's Healing Hand
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target. Clear and present danger must threaten the target or the priest

success.description: A nimbus of holy light surrounds the target, healing and protecting him. The target is healed of 1 wound
The target is healed of 2 wounds, or 1 critical wound of severity 2 or less is converted into a normal wound

boon.description: While this action is recharging, the target's Soak value is increased by 1

bane.description: You lose 1 Cunning die from your dice budget

sigmarsComet.description: One of the target's critical wounds (of any severity) is cured

reckless.name: Sigmar's Healing Hand
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Magnus Gottschalk;
Engaged with target. Clear and present danger must threaten the target or the priest

success.description: A nimbus of holy light surrounds the target, healing and protecting him. The target is healed of 1 wound
The target is healed of 3 wounds, or 1 critical wound of severity 3 or less is converted into a normal wound

boon.description: While this action is recharging, the target's Soak value is increased by 1

bane.description: Lector Gottschalk loses 1 Cunning die from his dice budget

sigmarsComet.description: Double the effect of any healing done by this blessing (twice as many wounds healed or critical wounds converted)
